filesChanged: reports/*.json refreshed as a side-effect of required validate/qa/audit commands (no DB writes)

deprecatedTypeInActive.note: antonym_choice/cet_cloze count = 0 in both active and draft

answerErrorInActive.note: para_match 'idx>=choices' (50) was a FALSE POSITIVE: para_match answer indexes paragraphs in the stimulus (7-9 paras), not the 5 choices; re-checked against paragraph count => 0 out of range

promoteBypassesBlocked.note: promote script + RPC reject deprecated/scoring_not_ready/official_spec_unverified/grouped-without-stimulus/listening-without-active-audio/productive-without-rubric/answer-invalid; double validation (client + server RPC, single txn). BUT see P1 blind spot for input_mode='speak'.

qaMissedObviousBadItem.note: all gates exit 0; QA covers structure/length/contamination/deprecated but does NOT cover word-selection representativeness, complete_the_words material leak, or speak-audio gating (documented as P1/P2).

listeningActiveMissingAudioOrLeaksTransc.note: 224/224 active listening sets have active audio, 0 null stimulus; client transcript isolation verified earlier by smoke:active-serve

productiveImpersonatesOfficial.note: all 626 active productive items have rubric_id and answer.official=false; 0 official=true

massHomogeneousOrReskin.note: dup_prompt ~= 0 (no reskins), BUT word-universe target words are 88% letter 'a' (P1 representativeness)

needsSchemaFrontendRatelimitChange.note: P1 promote/RPC speak-audio gating fix would touch the RPC SQL; recorded as recommendation, NOT executed this phase

A_READY_CANDIDATE.rationale: word-universe single-answer vocab MCQs; answer-in-choices 100%, no duplicate option text, no audio dependency, no Chinese contamination, no deprecated, no blocked flag.
promoteConditions: stratified sampling across letters (NOT all 'a') because target words are 88% 'a'
spot-check distractor quality before each small batch

context_collocation_choice.reason: prompt naturalness / distractor quality uneven (e.g. cloze_choice distractors wrong part-of-speech; collocation prompt 'him' too sparse)

spell.reason: spell exact-match scoring; word_form / zh_to_word_spell may have multiple valid forms -> confirm equivalence-scoring contract before promote (multi-solution risk)

passage.reason: migrated_v1 source originality/copyright spot-check + semantic answer (paraphrase/matching) human review

audio_missing_listen.reason: input_mode=listen but 0 active audio assets on stimulus

audio_speaking_pipeline.reason: input_mode=speak; listen_and_repeat has null stimulus (no audio source); speaking auto-scoring pipeline not verified

scoring_not_ready.reason: qa_flags.scoring_not_ready=true; only canonical answer, no equivalence-scoring contract

D_DELETE_OR_REWORK.note: no whole class warrants deletion; individual cases handled inside B review: cloze_choice 1 duplicate prompt, collocation_choice sparse prompts, some weak distractors. word_form/zh_to_word_spell multi-solution items may drop to D during review.

hardChecksAllPassed.chinese_contamination_in_en_tasks: 0 (non-ASCII hits are by-design: word_form Chinese hints, synonym_substitute fullwidth quotes, cloze_choice/spell curly quotes)

wordUniverseLetterSkew.implication: vocab pool imported from dictionary head (a-heavy), not frequency/syllabus balanced => representativeness P1

gateResults.validate:question-types: errors 0; word universe types 13; deprecated antonym_choice/cet_cloze registered
gateResults.audit:qbank-v2-coverage: sets 5623 draft 3630 active 1993; EXPECTED MISSING 6 THIN 0 READY_ACTIVE 38 BLOCKED 5; ACTUAL active-pool warnings 94
gateResults.validate:practice-session: errors 0; deprecated rejected; toefl/sat task v2 served
gateResults.validate:papers: errors 0; cet4 mini 12.4s, listening section 11.8s (smoke gate)
gateResults.validate:papers:full: NOT run as a gate (manual slow/stress test only; may be affected by remote DB/Storage state)

problems.desc: target words 88% letter 'a', none p-z; representativeness/homogeneity. Promote requires stratified cross-letter sampling; longer-term re-balance selection by frequency/syllabus.

stimulus.text_en contains the full answer word (70/70) while prompt does not (0/70); input_mode=spell is treated as non-listening by session-builder, so stimulus text_en may be shipped to client => answer leak. Confirm render layer drops stimulus text for spell-with-stimulus.

audio gating keys on task_type=listening_comprehension OR input_mode='listen'; input_mode='speak' (listen_and_repeat needs audio, interview_speaking needs speaking-scoring pipeline) only checks rubric => could be promoted prematurely. Recommend explicit BLOCK or extend gating. Not triggered this phase (no promote).
section_id all null; no 4-domain split, so per-domain organisation/sampling impossible. Add domain metadata for SAT R&W.

exact-match spell scoring may reject valid alternate forms (learned/learnt) or alternate words for a Chinese gloss => multi-solution under single-answer scoring. Confirm equivalence contract or move offending items to D.
originality/copyright not verified; spot-check before promoting passage drafts.

the spec mentions official_spec_unverified, but it does not exist as a qa_flag key in DB; promote script/RPC still defensively check it. audio_missing/paper_not_ready also are not qa_flags (derived). No action needed; documented for accuracy.

recommendations.firstPromoteSmallBatch: After human spot-check passes, start with the structurally most-certain, already-active-validated objective vocab MCQs: def_to_word / synonym_choice / confusable_choice, ~20 per type, STRATIFIED across letters (not all 'a'), single exam at a time. Keep --apply gated and small.
recommendations.humanReview: cloze_choice/collocation_choice (naturalness/distractors); all passage drafts (migrated_v1 source + semantic answers); word_form/zh_to_word_spell (multi-solution).
recommendations.needsMoreContent: word-universe letters p-z (currently 0); SAT domain metadata; TOEFL audio for listen_to_meaning/dictation_spell/listen_and_repeat.
recommendations.mustStayBlocked: listen_to_meaning, dictation_spell, listen_and_repeat, interview_speaking, build_a_sentence (430 total) until audio/speaking-scoring pipelines exist.
